'''鈭歜-m-t''' ('''kabamat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macroagglutinate|macroagglutinate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macroagglutinate|macroagglutinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-m-t
|-
! Lemma
| kabamat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibamat|thibamat]] || [[word:jibamat|jibamat]] || [[word:shibamat|shibamat]] || [[word:kibamat|kibamat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubamat|thuthubamat]] || [[word:jujubamat|jujubamat]] || [[word:shushubamat|shushubamat]] || [[word:kukubamat|kukubamat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubamat|thubamat]] || [[word:jubamat|jubamat]] || [[word:shubamat|shubamat]] || [[word:kubamat|kubamat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubamat|thubamat]] || [[word:jubamat|jubamat]] || [[word:shubamat|shubamat]] || [[word:kubamat|kubamat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebamat|thebamat]] || [[word:jebamat|jebamat]] || [[word:shebamat|shebamat]] || [[word:kebamat|kebamat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobamat|thothobamat]] || [[word:jojobamat|jojobamat]] || [[word:shoshobamat|shoshobamat]] || [[word:kokobamat|kokobamat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobamat|thobamat]] || [[word:jobamat|jobamat]] || [[word:shobamat|shobamat]] || [[word:kobamat|kobamat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobamat|thobamat]] || [[word:jobamat|jobamat]] || [[word:shobamat|shobamat]] || [[word:kobamat|kobamat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]] || [[word:bamat|bamat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bamat|th忙bamat]] || [[word:j忙bamat|j忙bamat]] || [[word:sh忙bamat|sh忙bamat]] || [[word:k忙bamat|k忙bamat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabamat|thathabamat]] || [[word:jajabamat|jajabamat]] || [[word:shashabamat|shashabamat]] || [[word:kakabamat|kakabamat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabamat|thabamat]] || [[word:jabamat|jabamat]] || [[word:shabamat|shabamat]] || [[word:kabamat|kabamat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabamat|thabamat]] || [[word:jabamat|jabamat]] || [[word:shabamat|shabamat]] || [[word:kabamat|kabamat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabamat|shabamat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabamat|goshabamat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabamat|gokishabamat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabamatn眉|shabamatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabamatnkn眉|goshabamatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabamatn眉|gokishabamatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabamatsh毛|shabamatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabamatnksh毛|goshabamatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabamatsh毛|gokishabamatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabamatro|shabamatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabamatnkro|goshabamatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabamatro|gokishabamatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabamatmu|shabamatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabamatnkmu|goshabamatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabamatmu|gokishabamatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabamatsher|shabamatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabamatnksher|goshabamatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabamatsher|gokishabamatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabamatng|shabamatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabamatnkng|goshabamatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabamatng|gokishabamatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabamatya|shabamatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabamatnkya|goshabamatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabamatya|gokishabamatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabamatyam|shabamatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabamatnkyam|goshabamatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabamatyam|gokishabamatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabamatn眉sh毛|shabamatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabamatnkn眉sh毛|goshabamatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabamatn眉sh毛|gokishabamatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabamatn眉ro|shabamatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabamatnkn眉ro|goshabamatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabamatn眉ro|gokishabamatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabamatn眉mu|shabamatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabamatnkn眉mu|goshabamatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabamatn眉mu|gokishabamatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabamatsh毛n眉|shabamatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabamatnksh毛n眉|goshabamatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabamatsh毛n眉|gokishabamatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabamatsh毛ro|shabamatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabamatnksh毛ro|goshabamatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabamatsh毛ro|gokishabamatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabamatsh毛mu|shabamatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabamatnksh毛mu|goshabamatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabamatsh毛mu|gokishabamatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabamatron眉|shabamatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabamatnkron眉|goshabamatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabamatron眉|gokishabamatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabamatrosh毛|shabamatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabamatnkrosh毛|goshabamatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabamatrosh毛|gokishabamatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabamatromu|shabamatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabamatnkromu|goshabamatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabamatromu|gokishabamatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabamatmun眉|shabamatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabamatnkmun眉|goshabamatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabamatmun眉|gokishabamatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabamatmush毛|shabamatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabamatnkmush毛|goshabamatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabamatmush毛|gokishabamatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabamatmuro|shabamatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabamatnkmuro|goshabamatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabamatmuro|gokishabamatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
